title: Enel’s Rule Becomes Clear
description: Zoro and the other fighters are pulled into separate battles as Upper Yard becomes a maze of enemies.
scene: Across pages 3, 4, 5, 6, this scene centers on Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall, Luffy. Zoro and the other fighters are pulled into separate battles as Upper Yard becomes a maze of enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: It uses sharp wind to float...
